docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SILVER BULLET EXPRESS COURIER SERVICE,INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TARKINGTON,O'CONNOR & O'NEILL,INC. TARKINGTON,CHRIS O'CONNOR,JOHN O'NEILL,STEVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-31-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF APR-20-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TARKINGTON,O'CONNOR & O'NEILL,INC. TARKINGTON,CHRIS O'CONNOR,JOHN O'NEILL,STEVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SILVER BULLET EXPRESS COURIER SERVICE,INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TARKINGTON,O'CONNOR & O'NEILL,INC. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,025.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,275.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT TARKINGTON,O'CONNOR & O'NEILL,INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TARKINGTON,O'CONNOR & O'NEILL,INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $783.84 AS TO DEFENDANT TARKINGTON,O'CONNOR & O'NEILL,INC.
